text: Good morning, Below is the requested additional information (include the year) to the UNCLASS tear line. Let us know if you have any questions, comments or concerns. v/r PAROC Intel Data Analysis Technician 15 AF / DET 1 //UNCLASSIFIED// 31 OCT 24, U.S Aircraft observed a possible UAP. It appeared to be oval/orb shaped, likely moving at a low speed. The U.S Aircraft had eyes on the poss UAP for over 2 hours. //UNCLASSIFIED// Hello, Could you please approve the use of the year this incident took place? Currently you have approved the month and the day, we request it includes the year. Thank for your assistance. V/r Information Disclosure Analyst
